channel.title: BandiRadar — matched opportunities
channel.description: Italian public funding opportunities matched to a company profile.

item.title: Italia – Stazione centrale di controllo – FORNITURA DI N.1 SISTEMA DI MONITORAGGIO DA DESTINARE AL NUOVO PRONTO SOCCORSO DEL P.O. G.RUMMO DELL'A.O.R.N. SAN PIO
item.description: Score 78/100. Deadline: —. CPV 33195200 (monitoring systems) aligns perfectly with company's CPV interest 33000000 and stated capability in monitoraggio; Contract value of €310,136 falls squarely within company's operating range (€50k-€3M); Supply of medical monitoring equipment to hospital emergency department matches core business of medical device distribution to healthcare structures; Company has specific expertise in monitoring systems for healthcare facilities; Italian public healthcare tender from healthcare facility (A.O. SAN PIO)

item.title: Italia – Sistemi diagnostici – Gara europea a procedura aperta per l'affidamento della fornitura “in “service” di sistemi per il laboratorio analisi del Poliambulatorio Montezemolo (ASP 6385855)
item.description: Score 72/100. Deadline: 2026-08-03. CPV code 33124110 (diagnostic systems for laboratory analysis) aligns with company's CPV interest 33000000 (medical devices); Contract value of €2,000,000 falls within company's stated range (€50k-€3M); Company specializes in medical device supply and healthcare facility equipment, matching the diagnostic laboratory systems procurement; Open European procedure allows non-Italian EU companies to bid; Service model ('in service') aligns with company's distribution and supply capabilities

item.title: Italia – Dispositivi e prodotti medici vari – MATERIALE DI CONSUMO PER LA RIPRODUZIONE UMANA E PMA
item.description: Score 72/100. Deadline: —. Company specializes in medical device distribution matching CPV 33000000, opportunity is CPV 33190000 (medical consumables) - related but narrower; Opportunity value €1.2M falls within company's stated range €50k-€3M; ASL BA is public healthcare entity; company has experience with hospital/ASST structures; Company focuses on endoscopy, monitoring, oxygen therapy; opportunity is for reproductive/PMA consumables - different medical specialty

item.title: Italia – Dispositivi e prodotti medici vari – STENT URETERALI, CATETERI DI DRENAGGIO PER VIA PERCUTANEA DELL’APPARATO URINARIO E BILIARE
item.description: Score 72/100. Deadline: 2026-09-03. Company specializes in medical device distribution matching CPV 33000000; opportunity is CPV 33190000 (medical devices subcategory); Opportunity value (€569,132) falls within company's stated range (€50k-€3M); Company distributes supplies to hospital structures and ASST; issuer is a major Turin hospital; Urology/ureteral stents and drainage catheters are medical devices within company's core competency; Lombardy-based company can serve a northern Italian healthcare facility

item.title: Italia – Dispositivi e prodotti medici vari – Fornitura in service di un Sistema diagnostico completamente automatizzato per l’esecuzione di test di conferma per HIV 1 e 2, HCV e Treponema Pallidum con tecnica ImmunoBlot
item.description: Score 72/100. Deadline: —. Company's core business (dispositivi medici e forniture sanitarie) directly aligns with opportunity for medical diagnostic equipment; Value of 540,560 EUR falls within company's stated range (50,000–3,000,000 EUR); CPV code 33190000 (medical devices) matches company's CPV interest in 33000000; Opportunity is for supply (fornitura in service), matching company's distribution and supply capabilities; However, opportunity issuer is ASL BA (Bari, Puglia region), while company operates in Lombardia

item.title: Italia – Impianto per la circolazione extracorporea – Procedura aperta, ai sensi dell’art. 71 del D.Lgs. 36/2023 e ss.mm., per la fornitura di n°1 Sistema per la Circolazione Extracorporea (CEC) e materiale di consumo
item.description: Score 72/100. Deadline: 2026-09-15. CPV codes (33180000, 33186000) align with company's medical device interests (CPV 33000000); Supply of medical equipment for hospital structures matches core business of medical device distribution; Value (€785,000) falls within company's range (€50,000–€3,000,000); Company has demonstrated capability in hospital medical device supply; Open procedure complies with standard tender participation

item.title: Italia – Apparecchi diagnostici – noleggio triennale di n.2 sistemi di cariotipizzazione automatica e FISH
item.description: Score 62/100. Deadline: 2026-07-11. Company specializes in medical device distribution and hospital supplies, which aligns with diagnostic equipment rental; CPV code 33124100 (diagnostic apparatus) matches company's CPV interest in 33000000; Opportunity value (420k EUR) falls within company's stated value range (50k-3M EUR); Issuer is a major Italian hospital (A.O. San Camillo Forlanini) matching target customer base; Company operates in Lombardia region; opportunity appears Italy-wide with no regional restriction stated; However, karyotypization and FISH systems are specialized cytogenetics equipment, not core endoscopy/oxygen therapy focus

item.title: Italia – Dispositivi e prodotti medici vari – PA - PROCEDURA APERTA (ART. 71, DEL D. LGS. 36/2023) PER L’AFFIDAMENTO DELLA FORNITURA DI MATERIALE DI CONSUMO PER INIETTORI MDC ULRICH MEDICAL
item.description: Score 45/100. Deadline: 2026-08-05. Medical device supply opportunity matches core business (dispositivi medici); Value (€1,022,040) within company's range (€50k-€3M); CPV 33190000 closely related to company's CPV interest 33000000; Company has demonstrated capability in hospital material supply; Issued by Italian public health authority (ASL); Geographic mismatch: opportunity in Campania (Naples), company operates in Lombardia only

item.title: Italia – Apparecchi per mammografia – Consultazione preliminare di mercato propedeutica all’indizione di una procedura aperta per l’affidamento della fornitura con posa di n. 2 mammografi digitali con tomosintesi
item.description: Score 45/100. Deadline: —. Company specializes in medical device distribution and supply, which aligns with mammography equipment provision; CPV code 33111650 (mammography apparatus) is within the company's CPV interest area 33000000; Company has experience supplying hospitals and ASST structures, matching the issuer type; Geographic mismatch: opportunity is in Sicily (Agrigento), company is based in Lombardy; Product focus mismatch: company specializes in endoscopy, monitoring, and oxygen therapy - not imaging equipment like mammography; Opportunity appears to be preliminary market consultation, not yet a formal tender

item.title: Italia – Medicinali vari – Fornitura farmaci 2026
item.description: Score 35/100. Deadline: 2026-08-04. CPV code 33690000 (pharmaceutical products) is tangentially related but distinct from company's primary focus on medical devices (CPV 33000000); Company specializes in medical devices and supplies, not pharmaceuticals/medicines; Opportunity value (898k EUR) falls within company's stated range; Issuer location (Putignano, Basilicata) is outside company's Lombardia region; No geographic scope mention for the tender reduces alignment clarity

item.title: Italia – Colture microbiologiche – GARA EUROPEA A PROCEDURA APERTA AI SENSI DELL’ART. 71 DEL D.LGS. 36/2023, PER L’AFFIDAMENTO DELLA FORNITURA DI TERRENI DI COLTURA DESTINATI AI REPARTI DELL’ISTITUTO ZOOPROFILATTICO SPERIMENTALE DELL’ABRUZZO E DEL MOLISE “G. CAPORALE”, PER LA DURATA DI 36 MESI, CON OPZIONE DI RINNOVO PER ULTERIORI 24 MESI
item.description: Score 25/100. Deadline: —. CPV code 33698100 (microbiological culture media) is adjacent to but distinct from company's CPV interest 33000000 (medical devices); Company specializes in medical device distribution for hospitals; this tender is for microbiological culture media for a veterinary/zoological institute; Geographic mismatch: company operates in Lombardia, tender is for Abruzzo/Molise region; Budget (410k EUR) falls within company's value range; Product category (culture media) is not explicitly mentioned in company's core capabilities
